    T

    Test - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject
    Test utility class for generating SQL INSERT statements for train trips.

    tick(long) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller.SimulationController
    Advances the virtual time based on real elapsed time and speed factor.

    Returns the station name as the string representation.

    Represents a physical track segment connecting two stations.

    Creates a new track segment connecting two stations.

    Train - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model
    Represents an individual train in the transportation system.
    Train(int, String, TrainType) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Train
    Creates a new train with specified properties.
    TrainType - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model
    Represents a classification of trains with shared operational characteristics.
    TrainType(int, String, String, double, double, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrainType
    Creates a new train type with all operational characteristics.
